since_last: 72% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.77%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 72% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -0.51% · Gold -1.71%. 72% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.77%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.77%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.41%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: EQIX is the standout at -9.94%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +8.42%, CEVA +7.24%, DLR +5.25%, MRVL +5.23%, LRCX +5.02%. Laggards: EQIX -9.94%, IBM -2.44%, WDAY -1.46%, BABA -1.22%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.72% at $190.43
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.72% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
